name: Tour Quality Golf
address: 6006 S Sheridan Rd Suite A, Tulsa, OK 74145
about: Tour Quality Golf is an indoor golf training facility in Tulsa, Oklahoma, offering year-round access through TrackMan-powered simulator bays. The facility provides comprehensive services including PGA-certified coaching, precision club fitting, and golf club repair, catering to golfers of all skill levels. It operates on a flexible model, allowing non-members to book bays by the hour while also offering multi-tiered memberships for those seeking unlimited, 24/7 access.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round, all-weather indoor access to premium TrackMan simulators
Comprehensive services from lessons and fittings to club repair under one roof
Flexible pricing model with no membership required for bay rentals

food_and_drink.notes: No food services mentioned on the website.
No alcohol services mentioned on the website.

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator hardware used for bay rentals and fitting services.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the facility offers a variety of demo gear across multiple brands for use during fittings and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink services are mentioned, indicating they are not available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time for an 18-hole simulation, as pricing is based on hourly bay rentals rather than per-round.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue specifically offers a Junior Membership for golfers under 17, indicating a welcoming environment for younger players.
